text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've finally gathered enough members for a full
Unity Cup team. At first, our training sessions go
well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the team starts to fall apart as they
become overly considerate of each other's
feelings and find themselves constantly walking
on eggshells.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The members of Team Zenith, meanwhile, start to
demonstrate real results under their strict
management, and they seem to fully trust Ms.
Kashimoto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I start to worry whether we really have any chance
at winning the Unity Cup.
